channel.title: Meshery RSSFeed
channel.description: Expect more from your infrastructure. Cloud native, open source software for your internal development platforms, your DevOps, platform engineering and site reliability engineering teams. Less finger-pointing and more collaborating. Allowing developers to focus on business logic, not infrastructure concerns. Empowering operators to confidently run modern infrastructure.

item.title: Meshery Workshop at CCOSS 2021
item.description: Announcing the participation of the Meshery project in CCOSS 2021 event

item.title: The Story of Meshery's 1,000 Stars
item.description: Meshery has achieved yet another milestone! Our GitHub repository has surpassed a 1,000 stars.

item.title: Recap KubeCon China 2021: TAG Network Deep-Dive
item.description: Learn about the CNCF's Technical Advisory Group for Network's projects, including each of the initiatives in the Service Mesh Working Group, and how Meshery is central to each one of them.
item.dc:creator: Deepak Gupta
item.content:tags: CNCF, Meshery, Service Mesh Performance, Nighthawk

item.title: How to write unit and integration tests for mesheryctl
item.description: Unit and integration tests bolster and roll up into broader end-to-end, functional testing performed across Meshery and the rest of its components.
item.dc:creator: Piyush Singariya

item.title: KubeCon + CloudNativeCon, India 2026

item.title: Infrastructure as Design by Meshery
item.content:encoded: Join host Whitney Lee and guest Lee Calcote to learn more! Meshery is a self-service engineering platform that enables the collaborative…

item.title: Making the CNCF Landscape Interactive with Meshery
item.description: Join the Kubesimplify livestream for an engaging livestream where we dive into the dynamic world of the Cloud Native Computing Foundation (CNCF) Landscape and explore how Meshery, the collaborative cloud native manager, is revolutionizing it. In this session, we’ll demonstrate how Meshery not only simplifies the management of all Kubernetes-based infrastructure, but also makes the CNCF Landscape interactive, allowing for a more intuitive and hands-on experience.
item.content:encoded: Join the Kubesimplify livestream on May 1st, 2024 at 11:00 AM CT / 09:30 PM IST and meet Lee Calcote () and Saiyam Pathak (
